name: English to Mandarin translator
task: Translate English source text into Simplified Mandarin Chinese. Maintain register, idiom, and code-switching faithfulness; preserve tagged code blocks verbatim.
verifier: BLEU-4 against held-out reference set + Mandarin character ratio >= 0.7 in output + zero source-language tokens after the first character.
notes: Qwen 2.5 was trained heavily on Chinese, so it's the strongest base for this task. A 7B LoRA fine-tune on 1-2k high-quality en-zh pairs gets to professional-translator quality on news/general-domain text. For technical domains (medical, legal, finance) extend seeds with domain glossary pairs.
